General.Name: Neurizer Ltd
General.Description: NeuRizer Ltd. manufactures and sells urea fertilizers in Australia. It operates NeuRizer Urea project that deliver nitrogen-based fertilizers for agricultural markets. The company was formerly known as Leigh Creek Energy Limited and changed its name to NeuRizer Ltd. in March 2022. NeuRizer Ltd. is based in Adelaide, Australia.

0.Name: Mr. Daniel Justyn Douglas Peters B.A., L.L.B.
0.Title: Executive Chairman
